stemHtml:
Consider the following METAR and SPECI observations

METAR EGVN 061620Z 33022G34KT 290V350 7000 TSRA FEW015 BKN025CB BKN040 24/16 Q1016 TEMPO 4000 TSGR

SPECI EGVN 061630Z 33022G33KT 300V350 6000 FEW015 BKN025TCU BKN040 23/16 Q1016

The SPECI was issued because:

options.a: Of the change in wind speed and direction, with the consequence that aircraft performance calculations may require revision.
options.b: Of the reduction of temperature, with the consequence that aircraft performance calculations may require revision.
options.c: Of the change in the prevailing visibility resulting from an unexpected lowering of the cloud base.
options.d: The thunderstorm has finished, and the associated precipitation has ended.
